round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent acknowledged other agents' findings in R2 but maintained the same reasoning and ranking.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent synthesized cross-agent evidence (road/camera) in R2 to boost confidence, though the botanical evidence itself remained unchanged.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent incorporated landscape observations (shoulder composition) in R2 to refine confidence, but the core regulatory evidence was static.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent integrated landscape and botanics findings in R2 to reinforce the conclusion, showing synthesis.

role_leakage_notes.botanics: Minor leakage: Referenced 'road shoulder composition' (landscape) and 'camera artifacts' (meta) to justify botanical confidence.
role_leakage_notes.regulatory: Minor leakage: Referenced 'coarse gravel shoulders' (landscape) and 'Meta agent' (meta) to justify regulatory confidence.
role_leakage_notes.meta: Minor leakage: Referenced 'Landscape and Botanics agents' (landscape/botany) to reinforce meta-level camera/infrastructure analysis.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting the lack of linguistic data and effectively weighting the landscape, regulatory, and meta agents' observations regarding road shoulders and delineator posts to confirm Russia. The chain of reasoning is clear and eliminates alternatives based on specific visual absences (delineators).
